titles.title: How Can I Keep From Singing

authors.author: Ed Cash
Ed Cash
Wie könnt ich dir nicht singen (Ein Lied dringt durch die Zeit)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is an endless song Echoes in my soul I hear the music ring

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And though the storms may come I am holding on To the rock I cling

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: How can I keep from singing Your praise How can I ever say enough How amazing is Your love How can I keep from shouting Your name I know I am loved by the King And it makes my heart want to sing

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will lift my eyes In the darkest night For I know my Savior lives

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And I will walk with You Knowing You'll see me through And sing the songs You give

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: How can I keep from singing Your praise How can I ever say enough How amazing is Your love How can I keep from shouting Your name I know I am loved by the King And it makes my heart want to sing

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I can sing in the troubled times Sing when I win I can sing when I lose my step And fall down again I can sing'cause You pick me up Sing'cause You're there I can sing'cause You hear me, Lord When I call to You in prayer I can sing with my last breath Sing for I know That I'll sing with the angels And the saints around the throne
